items.headline: BMO Capital Reaffirms Outperform Rating for CMS Energy (CMS)
items.summary: CMS Energy Corp. (NYSE:CMS) is one of the 11 best regulated electric stocks to buy now. On June 4, BMO Capital analyst James Thalacker maintained an Outperform rating on CMS Energy Corp. (NYSE:CMS) and reduced the price target from $82 to $81. This revision follows a fresh regulatory filing by the company’s subsidiary, Consumers Energy, […]

items.headline: How CMS Energy’s New CFO Team and Leadership Shuffle (CMS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
items.summary: Earlier this week, CMS Energy announced that Sri Maddipati will become Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, while Chris Fultz will assume the role of senior vice president and president of electric supply, as longtime CFO Rejji Hayes retires. The reshuffle elevates leaders with both operational and financial expertise, concentrating oversight of investor relations, capital planning and the electric supply business in a closely connected management team. items.headline: Jefferies downgrades CMS energy after surprise CFO exit, cuts target to hold woes
items.summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies has downgraded utility company CMS Energy from Buy to Hold and cut its price target to $74 from $88, citing growing uncertainty surrounding the company's leadership transition, data center growth prospects, and the future of its NorthStar business segment.
